reviews.comment:
En la unica estacion de YPF, la del ACA de Gesell (cargo infinia nafta) donde no me quieren hacer factura A, el mismo empleado me dijo que no se puede hacer si pago con la aplicacion, cosa curiosa, no se que hizo pero se me colgo la pagina y tuve que pagar en efectivo, el empleado se dio el gusto! yo nunca mas volvere al ACA ni para ir al bano.

(Translated by Google)
At the only YPF station, the one at the ACA in Gesell (I filled up with Infinia gasoline), where they refused to give me an invoice, the same employee told me it couldn't be done if I paid with the app. Oddly enough, I don't know what happened, but the website crashed and I had to pay in cash. The employee really enjoyed himself! I'll never go back to the ACA again, not even to use the restroom.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/12748059352839021938/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNSc2I2RjdBRRAB

reviews.comment:
La atención en el full por parte de las chicas excelente. Me solucionaron un problema de luce del auto con una predisposición admirable. Gracias

(Translated by Google)
The service at the full service center from the girls was excellent. They resolved a problem with my car's lights with admirable helpfulness. Thank you.
